policy_description: This step records user-supplied result review decisions.
All three matched Step 14U evidence rows are accepted for future materialization.
Acceptance here is only an input to a future application gate.
Blocked unmatched inputs remain blocked and are not used as ready candidates.
No training is allowed or performed.
No sample index or final dataset is written.
No split assignment or leakage matrix is written.
A separate application gate must apply decisions before any ready candidate materialization.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
Leakage/split design remains required before training.
The five canonical masks are unchanged.
Decision input artifacts are not training inputs.
